summary:
In eukaryotic cells, all requirements are met through RNA polymerase for gene transcription, ribosomes including both 40S and 60S subunits forming functional complexes like 80S, which catalyze peptide bond formation directly; whereas amine acyl-tRNA synthetases prepare charged tRNAs but aren't continuously needed once they enter the translational machinery post-initiation steps. Thus,
\[ \boxed{\text{D}} \]

Conversely, although vital initially, Amnyloyc acid tRNA synthetases serve mainly pre-translational functions preparing appropriate amino-acids attached correctly onto respective tRNAS molecules rather than being perpetually mandatory elements alongside operational ribosomes performing core synthetic tasks after initiating stages have concluded successfully leading up until completion phases where no new input beyond existing resources suffices anymore thus concluding succinctly at
